segments.text: Lord, how many are my foes! How many rise up against me!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But you, Lord, are a shield around me, my glory, the One who lifts my head high.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I call out to the Lord, and he answers me from his holy mountain.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I lie down and sleep; I wake again, because the Lord sustains me.
I will not fear though tens of thousands assail me on every side.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Arise, Lord! Deliver me, my God! Strike all my enemies on the jaw; break the teeth of the wicked.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: From the Lord comes deliverance. May your blessing be on your people.
segments.speaker: David
